events.title: Wikimedia Hackathon 2026 - MediaWiki
events.description: The 2026 Wikimedia Hackathon will take place in person, onsite Milan, Italy at voco - Milan Fiere hotel. The 2026 event is being organized by the Wikimedia Foundation in collaboration with local Wikimedia affiliate, Wikimedia Italia.

events.title: EuroGenAI Hackathon League For Social Good: dai giovani, soluzioni ...
events.description: EuroGenAI: la sfida La challenge sarà presentata il 20 marzo 2026 , giorno dell'hackathon di Milano , e riguarderà lo sviluppo di soluzioni per: promuovere la sostenibilità ambientale e l'impatto sociale nei territori urbani e periurbani che ospitano data center; valorizzare l'uso responsabile dell'IA, delle tecnologie e del digitale.

events.title: Wikimedia Hackathon 2026 - pretix.eu
events.description: The Wikimedia Hackathon is organized by the Wikimedia Foundation in collaboration with Wikimedia Italia (WMIT) and is taking place in-person in Milan, Italy, from May 1 - 3, 2026 . General registration will be open from mid-January until March 30, 2026 or until we reach event capacity. Each person that attends the Hackathon is required to register. We are requiring a $2 USD fee to register this ...

events.title: Milan Global Game Jam 2026 - IGDA Milan @ SAE Institute
events.description: Jan 27, 2026 · Site Details The Global Game Jam returns to Milan in 2026 ! IGDA Milan and SAE Institute Milan team up again to host the most important event for the game dev community. More information on the jam site will be available soon.
